notes: Small, offline index of MetaboLights studies explicitly relevant to the gut-brain / microbiome context (IDs + titles only).

records.title: Human gut microbes impact host serum metabolome and insulin sensitivity
Neuropeptide SP protects against colitis and linked anxiety-like behavior via gut microbiota and metabolite inositol: A multi-omics analysis of the gut-brain axis
Aerobic exercise and gut flora: a key link to improved cognitive impairment in mice with Parkinson's disease
Gut Microbiota Mediates Maternal PM2.5 Exposure-induced Neurodevelopmental Disorder in offspring via Disturbing the Glutamate Metabolism: Evidence from Multiomics Analysis
Intergenerational Association of Gut Microbiota and Metabolism with Perinatal Folate Metabolism and Neural Tube Defects (Feces metabolomics)

provenance.limitations: Only study IDs and titles are bundled (no raw/metabolite matrices).
